expectations.text: Recommends a hook (not a skill) for automatic file-read logging
expectations.evidence: Decision section clearly states 'Use a PostToolUse hook on the Read matcher'

expectations.text: Explains why a hook is better than a skill for this use case
expectations.evidence: Comparison table covers 5 criteria including 'Triggered automatically', 'Requires user action', 'Works even when Claude forgets'

expectations.text: Specifies PostToolUse as the correct hook event
expectations.evidence: Explicitly uses PostToolUse throughout; explains distinction from PreToolUse

expectations.text: Provides a concrete hook shell script or template
expectations.evidence: read-audit.sh written to outputs/ with session ID tracking via CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var
settings-snippet.json written and referenced in response; noted coexistence with existing read-tracker.sh
